## Codex Worker Spawn Prompt — CFP-963 fixture WITHOUT network_scope field
# CX-963-3 P2 boundary mandate — lint WARN expected (field absent)

**Story path**: mclayer/codeforge-internal-docs/wrapper/stories/CFP-963.md
**Lane**: 구현 / phase: 구현

**sandbox boundary**: local Phase 2 worktrees only

## Task

Perform analysis of the following files within the worktree:
- scripts/check-codex-network-scope.sh
- scripts/lib/check_codex_network_scope.py

Return findings in the standard review-verdict-v4 format.

NOTE: This fixture intentionally omits network_scope field to test lint detection.
